products.name: Cosmo 3-Seater Fabric Sofa
products.description: Premium velvet fabric sofa with high-density foam cushions and solid eucalyptus wood frame. Super comfortable and fits any modern living room setup.

products.name: Luxury Queen Platform Bed
products.description: Elegant queen-sized platform bed with an upholstered headboard, strong wooden slats, and no box spring required. Designed for premium comfort and style.

products.name: Premium Solid Wood Dining Set
products.description: Beautiful dining table made of solid oak wood, complete with 4 cushioned chairs. Perfect for dinner parties and family meals.

products.name: Ergonomic Height-Adjustable Desk
products.description: Electric height-adjustable standing desk with dual motor and memory presets. Ideal for a productive and healthy work-from-home layout.

products.name: Sleek Slide-door Wardrobe
products.description: Spacious double-door wardrobe with sliding mirror panel, multiple hanging rods, and integrated drawers for optimal bedroom storage.

products.name: Premium Ergonomic Mesh Chair
products.description: High-back office chair with adjustable 3D armrests, lumbar support, and breathable cooling mesh. Perfect companion for your study desk.

products.name: Smart Double-Door Refrigerator (350L)
products.description: Energy-efficient frost-free refrigerator featuring smart inverter technology, convertible freezer, and digital display control.

products.name: Front Load Fully-Automatic Washer (8kg)
products.description: Inverter front-load washing machine with steam wash, custom allergen cycle, and quiet operation mode. Keeps your clothes pristine.

products.name: Ultra HD 4K OLED Smart TV (55")
products.description: Vibrant self-lit OLED pixels, Dolby Vision IQ, Dolby Atmos sound system, and built-in streaming apps for an unparalleled home theater experience.

products.name: Convection Microwave Oven (28L)
products.description: Touch keypad control microwave supporting grill, bake, defrost, and multi-stage healthy cooking features. Clean touch door design.

products.name: Inverter Split Air Conditioner (1.5 Ton)
products.description: 5-Star split air conditioner featuring high ambient cooling, active PM 2.5 filter, and smart app scheduling options for perfect sleep.

products.name: Test Luxury Armchair
products.description: Comfortable fabric armchair with wooden legs, suitable for study or living room.

maintenance.issueDescription: The refrigerator's cooling has stopped suddenly and there is water leakage from the bottom compartment.
